mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_message (message_room_id, sender_id, content) VALUES (#{messageRoomId}, #{senderId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT msg.id, msg.sender_id, m.nickname AS sender_nickname, m.profile_image AS sender_profile_image, msg.content, msg.is_read, msg.created_datetime FROM tbl_message msg JOIN tbl_member m ON msg.sender_id = m.id WHERE msg.message_room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY msg.created_datetime ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_message msg JOIN tbl_message_room_member mrm ON msg.message_room_id = mrm.message_room_id WHERE mrm.member_id = #{memberId} AND mrm.left_at IS NULL AND msg.sender_id != #{memberId} AND msg.is_read = false
